positive: A stunning, symmetrical celestial wreath composed of bioluminescent moon flowers, swirling nebula dust, and geometric constellation lines. The design features deep midnight blues, vibrant aquamarine, glowing gold accents, and ethereal silver gradients. The composition must be centrally focused and highly scalable for apparel, creating a strong, clean silhouette. Style is intricate modern gothic botanical art mixed with vaporwave aesthetics. Lighting is highly contrastive, appearing to emanate softly from within the flora (glow-in-the-dark effect). Seamless, highly detailed line work, print-ready, vector quality, minimal shading for maximum contrast.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, username, border, frame, artifact, blurry, grainy, low contrast, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, smudge, dirty
